title: Senior Web Developer & Platforms Manager
subtitle: ACGL
shortDescription: Designed and developed 6 websites and 3 apps, attracting over 150k registered users with 1m+ annual visits.
items: Designed and developed 6 websites and 3 apps, attracting over 150k registered users with 1m+ visits annually

Engineered a tournament management system incorporating complex logic, gamification, loyalty points, API integrations, wallets, live chat, and more. Currently oversees 5k+ tournaments, 100k+ matches, and 40k+ teams

title: ICT Teacher
subtitle: Dr. Viljoen Primary School & Piet Retief Primary School

items: Overhauled the school network of 60+ devices, modernized 30+ PCs with the latest OS and office software, built 10+ new PCs, and installed 5 WIFI access points across school grounds
